file_summary: This file defines a FastAPI health check endpoint that returns service status information including whether DeepSeek API is configured.

line_windows.summary: This window contains the entire health check endpoint implementation. Lines 1-2 import FastAPI router and application settings. Line 4 creates an APIRouter instance tagged for health endpoints. Lines 7-16 define the health_check function decorated with @router.get("/health") that returns a dictionary with service status, name, and DeepSeek configuration status.

key_symbols: {'name': 'router', 'type': 'variable', 'description': 'FastAPI APIRouter instance for organizing health-related endpoints'}
{'name': 'health_check', 'type': 'function', 'description': 'Endpoint function that handles GET requests to /health and returns health status'}
dependencies_or_calls: {'name': 'router.get', 'type': 'decorator', 'description': 'Decorator that registers the health_check function as a GET endpoint at /health'}
{'name': 'bool(settings.deepseek_api_key)', 'type': 'function_call', 'description': 'Checks if DeepSeek API key is configured in settings'}
